description: A new customer forgot to enter their promotional code during signup and wants to have it applied retroactively.

nodes.task_description: Identify the customer's account and the promotional code they want to use.

expected_outcome.value: Agent gets the account and promo code details.

nodes.task_description: Verify that the promotional code is still valid and applicable to the customer's plan.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms the code is valid.

nodes.task_description: Apply the promotion to the customer's subscription, which will take effect on the next billing cycle, and issue a credit for the first month.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully applies the discount for future bills and credits the first one.
